summary: The implementation comprehensively addresses all requirements. The backend provides full CRUD operations with stable storage, the frontend displays products in a responsive grid with filtering, Pinterest integration stores pin URLs/IDs, product detail views are complete, admin interface uses Internet Identity authentication, category filtering works, and the design uses a cohesive warm earth-tone palette (avoiding blue/purple) with Playfair Display serif typography. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the diff evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile management system with profile setup modal and user name storage
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention user profiles, user names, or profile setup. The implementation includes ProfileSetup.tsx, getCallerUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile, and UserProfile type which were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Role-based access control system with permission checking beyond admin authentication
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only requires Internet Identity authentication for admin functions. The implementation includes a sophisticated access control system with MixinAuthorization, AccessControl module, hasPermission checks, and user roles beyond what was specified.
